items.title: Fenerbahce v Nottingham Forest: Europa League playoff, first leg – live
items.summary: ⚽ Europa League updates from the 5.45pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | You can email Will I was at Dyche’s final game in charge and Omari Hutchinson was underwhelming, to say the least. It will be interesting to see how he reacts to the new regime. Pereira: “Today is three days working. but working to play in a way to try short communications, be very clear. Today I hope that I see my team play organised with tactical organisation, and be able to express themselves, play with courage and a mentality to win.” Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: AZ begonnen aan eerste confrontatie met FC Noah
items.summary: AZ vervolgt donderdagavond het Europese avontuur. De Alkmaarders staan in de tussenronde van de Conference League tegenover het Armeense FC Noah. Volgende week is de return in Alkmaar. Volg de heenwedstrijd in deze VI Live.

items.title: Feyenoorder Sterling speelgerechtigd voor duel met Telstar
items.summary: Raheem Sterling heeft zijn werkvergunning binnen. Daardoor is hij op tijd speelgerechtigd voor het duel met Telstar. Feyenoord neemt het zondagavond in competitieverband op tegen de promovendus.

items.title: Echteld voorzichtig met Mijnans: 'Willen Smit na rust het karwei af laten maken'
items.summary: Na een maand blessureleed keert Sven Mijnans donderdagavond terug in de basisopstelling van AZ. Trainer Leeroy Echteld is echter erg voorzichtig met zijn aanvoerder en gaf voor het Conference League-duel met FC Noah prijs dat Mijnans na een klein uur gewisseld zal worden.

items.title: Controversial Women’s FA Cup plans on hold after pushback from clubs, players and fans
items.summary: No change next season and consultation extended ‘We have listened to the feedback,’ FA says Proposals to make radical changes to the Women’s FA Cup, including seeding the top four teams from the WSL, have been put on hold, the Guardian can reveal, after the Football Association received negative feedback about the controversial ideas. The FA had also intended to dispense with draw ceremonies after the last 32, introducing a “road to Wembley” bracket akin to a World Cup knockout phase pathway, and review the entry tiers for lower-league sides. But it has put the brakes on its plans after concerns were raised by a significant number of clubs, fan groups and players. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea’s Rosenior calls for life bans from football for those found guilty of racism
items.summary: ‘When you see a player upset, normally it’s for a reason’ Head coach reacts to Vinícius Júnior’s racism claims Liam Rosenior has called for players and coaches found guilty of racism to be banned from football for life and said experiencing abuse on a football pitch “is the worst feeling you can ever possibly imagine”. The Real Madrid forward Vinícius Júnior left the pitch after alleging that Benfica’s Gianluca Prestianni racially abused him during their Champions League match on Tuesday. Prestianni has denied racist abuse and Benfica have said he was a “victim” of a “smear campaign”. The Argentinian faces a 10-game ban if found guilty by Uefa. Continue reading...

items.title: Souttar signs new Rangers deal
items.summary: Defender John Souttar has signed a new deal with Rangers.

items.title: Wood: Warrington rematch could be my last fight
items.summary: Leigh Wood has revealed he could retire after his next fight, a rematch with Josh Warrington.

items.title: Opstelling AZ: Mijnans en Koopmeiners keren terug in basiself tegen FC Noah
items.summary: Sven Mijnans keert na een maand terug in de basisopstelling van AZ. De middenvelder, die sinds januari met een hamstringblessure kampte en zaterdag al zijn rentree maakte, mag zich als aanvoerder laten zien in het Conference League-duel met FC Noah. Kees Smit kan zijn rentree maken in Armenië, maar begint wel op de bank.

items.title: Leicester appeal against six-point deduction
items.summary: Leicester City appeal against a decision to deduct them six points for breaching English Football League financial rules.

items.title: The eerie similarities between Arsenal's 2007-8 collapse and now
items.summary: Arsenal's disappointing 2-2 draw at Wolves on Wednesday has similarities to what happened to the Gunners 18 years ago.

items.title: Op deze zender kijk je naar het Conference League-duel van AZ met Noah
items.summary: AZ komt donderdag weer in actie in de tussenronde van de Conference League. De ploeg uit Alkmaar neemt het in de eerste wedstrijd op tegen het Armeense Noah. AZ eindigde in de competitiefase buiten de topacht en moet daardoor nog een extra ronde overleven om de achtste finale te bereiken.

items.title: 'Anyone found guilty of racism should not be in the game'
items.summary: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior says anyone found guilty of racist behaviour in football "shouldn't be in the game".

items.title: Leicester City: A points deduction, another manager & 'grossly underperforming'
items.summary: A decade ago to this very day, Leicester City were sat atop the Premier League table on their way to a glorious, historic title.

items.title: Antonelli fastest as Hamilton endures disrupted final testing day
items.summary: Kimi Antonelli continued Mercedes' impressive showing at Formula 1's final 2026 pre-season test by topping the timesheet as Ferrari faced further disruption on Lewis Hamilton's last day on track before the Australian Grand Prix.

items.title: Bukayo Saka signs new Arsenal contract to 2030
items.summary: Bukayo Saka has signed a new contract to stay at Arsenal, with sources telling ESPN it is a five-year deal.

items.title: Benfica: 'Smear campaign' after Viní allegations
items.summary: SL Benfica have condemned the "smear campaign" to which their player Gianluca Prestianni has been subjected to following allegations that he racially abused Real Madrid's Vinícius Júnior.

items.title: Ange regrets Forest job, 'too soon' after Spurs
items.summary: Ange Postecoglou has admitted he regrets taking the head coach role at Nottingham Forest this season, believing it was "too soon" after he left Tottenham Hotspur.

items.title: Gordon makes UCL history with 4 goals in 1st half
items.summary: Newcastle United forward Anthony Gordon has become just the second player to score four goals in the first half of a UEFA Champions League game and the first to do so in the knockout stage.

items.title: Is it happening again? Arsenal's stumble in title race follows familiar pattern
items.summary: Arsenal's Premier League championship charge suffered yet another wobble on Wednesday, leaving many Gunners fans to wonder: "Is it happening again?"
